response.global_summary: A concert performance by four members of the Hololive group 'ReGLOSS' (Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, and Todoroki Hajime). The video begins with an intro sequence introducing the members, followed by their vocal performance.
